scripts.example: rm -rf examples/sample && cp -R packages/cli/templates/scaffold examples/sample && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const p = 'examples/sample/package.json'; fs.writeFileSync(p, fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8').replaceAll('{{name}}', 'sample'));" && pnpm -C examples/sample install && pnpm -C examples/sample exec hylo deploy --backend ${HYLO_BACKEND_URL:-https://hylo-backend.smithery.workers.dev}
